zh.Heron Hall, East Horndon, Brentwood dist: 英國英格蘭艾可易亞斯特 霍登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sidney於1421年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，她的父親William Sidney III33歲，母親Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell26歲。她於大約1449年與Nicholas Gaynsford在英國英格蘭素瑞卡沙阿爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年11月16日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國素瑞卡沙阿爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Sidney于1421年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，她的父亲William Sidney III33岁，母亲Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell26岁。她于大约1449年与Nicholas Gaynsford在英国英格兰素瑞卡沙阿爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年11月16日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国素瑞卡沙阿爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sidney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Sidney Farm in Alfold (Surrey), from Old English sīd ‘large, spacious, long’ (dative sīdan) + ēg ‘island’.
possibly also a habitational name from any of the places called Saint-Denis in Normandy, named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Dionysius (see   Dennis  ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Sydney
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): variant of   Sidney  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sidney was born in 1421, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Sidney III, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, was 26. She married Nicholas Gaynsford about 1449, in Carshalton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 16 November 1503, in her hometown, and was buried in Carshalton, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sidney est née en 1421, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sidney III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Gaynsford environ 1449, à Carshalton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 16 novembre 1503, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Carshalton, Surrey, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sidneyが1421年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Sidney IIIは33歳，母Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchellは26歳であった。約1449年にイギリスイギリススリーカーシャルトンでNicholas Gaynsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年11月16日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススリーカーシャルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sidney(이)가 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sidney III(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 카샤턴에서 Nicholas Gaynsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 11월 16일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수리 카샤턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Nicholas Gaynsford aproximadamente 1449, em Carshalton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sidney родилась в 1421 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Sidney III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Gaynsford около 1449 г. в местности каршэлтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 16 ноябрь 1503 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности каршэлтон, сурри, Англия.
